utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items, each fully detailed. 'property' includes type, price, location, features, and viewing date. 'financing' includes two mortgage options with processing fees, approval timeline, and currency. 'legal_services' lists service name, cost, currency, duration, and features. 'moving_services' includes both standard and premium packages with costs, currency, and features. 'setup_services' lists utility options, costs, and setup expenses. 'total_budget' provides a full cost breakdown, currency, and timeline. Since all required items are present and fully specified, the AI assistant covered all of them.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo priced at CAD $475,000, which falls under the purchase category. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the one that best matches this description and price range is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10). For financing, two options were presented: one with CAD $800 processing fees (corresponding to 'First-Time Buyer' rated 10) and one with CAD $1200 (corresponding to 'Traditional Mortgage' rated 8). The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD $1200, rating 8). For moving services, both 'standard_package' (CAD $650) and 'premium_package' (CAD $1200) are included, corresponding to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9) and 'Premium Moving' (rating 7). For utilities setup, both 'basic_utilities' (CAD $120) and 'premium_utilities' (CAD $280) are included, corresponding to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6) and 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). A survey cost of CAD $300 matches 'Basic Survey' (rating 9).
